query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ledger_access_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ledger_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  access_type ENUM('view', 'export', 'audit', 'fraud_investigation') NOT NULL,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  accessed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  FOREIGN KEY (ledger_id) REFERENCES house_ledgers(id)
);

  accessed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
